title: helichrysum lavanduloides
intro: Helichrysum lavanduloides, also known as the yellow fever tree or impetigo plant, is a shrub native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting off infections, making it a popular choice for treating skin conditions and injuries. Helichrysum lavanduloides is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
